title: Wide Column NoSQL Database Structure
description: A visual representation of the hierarchical, column-oriented data model used in systems like Cassandra and HBase, showing how data is organized into rows, column families, and columns.
relationships: A Row Key identifies a unique row. A row contains one or more Column Families. Each Column Family contains a set of related Columns. Each Column has a Column Qualifier (name) and a Cell, which stores the value and a timestamp for versioning.
